case_title: AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. VS. XUAN SHAO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAO, XUAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 8 LOCKSLEY AVENUE 	H, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, XUAN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, XUAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, XUAN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, XUAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. SERVED APR-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, XUAN
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $100.93 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC.
